  <path d="M256 220 L200 360 L312 360 Z" fill="#4e0073" opacity="0.6" />
  <!-- head -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="120" r="48" fill="#f8d2b1" stroke="#e0a87a" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- mouth -->

    <!-- jewels -->

    <circle cx="256" cy="68" r="6" fill="#ff8a80" stroke="#c75a5a" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="276" cy="60" r="6" fill="#ffd54f" stroke="#c79a00" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <!-- scepter -->
  <g transform="rotate(-20 380 300)">
    <rect x="360" y="260" width="8" height="160" fill="#b8860b" stroke="#7a4f02" stroke-width="2" rx="4"/>
    <circle cx="364" cy="252" r="14" fill="#ffd24d" stroke="#b07700" stroke-width="3"/>

  </g>
